rationale: RACI for AI system; legal workflow; accountability question

rationale: AI vs human in regulated medical workflow; eval/telemetry mention

query: what should we automate in our SOC alert triage and what should the analysts keep doing themselves? we have 200+ alerts/day, half are false positives. trying to figure out where to put AI without burning out the team or missing real attacks
rationale: What to automate vs keep human; security workflow
